title: Mustafa Amil | Associate Attorney | BAL Immigration Law
content:
Mustafa is an Associate in the Dallas office of BAL. He has a broad range of experience in immigrant and nonimmigrant employment-based law, advising both corporate clients and their employees. Mustafa offers counsel on visa petitions as well as the permanent residency process. He specifically focuses on H-1B, L-1, TN, E-3, EB-1C, PERM labor certification and national interest waivers. Mustafa is a member of the American Immigration Lawyers Association.
Southern Methodist University, J.D., cum laude University of Oklahoma, B.A., Political Science
